creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Created attachment 247906
new port patch

The port was prepared to replace devel/grpc142 recently marked broken. Without this port it's not possible to build net-mgmt/fastnetmon and problby other software requiring legacy devel/grpc. Peraps the port should be named devel/grpc-legacy ? It's based on the original  devel/grpc142 port and the version number follows Debian devs approach.
